hotel_name: Phuket Marriott Resort and Spa, Nai Yang Beach

reviews.title: horrible location, weired beach, dishonest staff
reviews.text: We were charged for breakfast even though I told them we were leaving at midnight. I asked if we could get a room upgrade instead of packing our breakfast to go. They said the better rooms were fully booked. But actually it was a rain season, and we hardly saw any other guests around.

reviews.title: My experience was bad with Hotel
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives: Almost everything

reviews.title: NEVER AGAIN
reviews.text:
First off, we chose this hotel for the location as it is close to the airport and we are travelling with a young child.

Upon check in, the hotel informed us there is an additional charge for one adult which was not clearly stated during the booking, imagine arriving the hotel after your flight and find out there is additional hidden charges.

Secondly, the main restaurant within the hotel has broken air conditioning between July 9-21 which is unacceptable especially in the Thailand heat. Not the mention the potential health risks it may pose to have buffet in the heat. While we were having our breakfast buffet, the hotel staff did not clean up the table at all during the buffet breakfast.

Thirdly, while my family and I were sitting poolside to enjoy some family time around 10-11am, that is when the hotel gardeners decide to mow the lawn near our area to disrupt the peace and left freshly cut grass all over our feet and belongings.

I will never return to this hotel and would never recommend it to anyone else. 

What low standards from Marriott, just plain, unacceptable.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 2 Double, Pool view, Pool access

reviews.title: No what was expected
reviews.text:
The hotel is heavily understaffed from check in, pool and restaurant staff.
The result of this is the staff are overworked and irritable, not typical of Thai style.
 Very little sun lounges and the photos of the pool area are mis-leading.
Smell of sewerage on ground floor of facility. Mosquitoes are ravenous with the hotel not taking any fumigating actions like other hotels in area.
Positives: In-Room dining tasty, mini bar very reasonably priced.
Room was nice a large as was bathroom.

reviews.title: We booked the biggest villa two bedroom, one living room, private pool, but we cannot swim in the pool. It’s so dirty ma
reviews.positives: The staff in the restaurant was nice and kind  ,, I ordered fruit to my room it came with bug inside,  me and family had food poisoned!
reviews.negatives: The beach is so dirty not clean and can’t swim never in the beach and no one seat near the beach from hotel to guide the residence and help them nobody bodyguard no swim guard naughty activities they said we have fishing, but no fishing?!

reviews.title: Cold water and yellow bath water
reviews.text:
The staff were apologetic about it but didn't do anything more than provide a free bottle of wine after much harassment - the water was literally ice cold and came out of the taps yellow. Not exactly a 5 star experience...

On the plus side though, their spa is amazing and the masseuses are the best I have experienced anywhere in Thailand.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr.Zen, 

Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts regarding to the issue during your stayed. 

We appreciate your bringing it to our attention. We will share your message appropriately within Management team. Also we take matters such as this very seriously. As a result, please allow us some time to look into this matter further.

We hope to have a chance welcome you back again soon.

Best regards, 
Lucy
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Garden view, Pool cabana

reviews.title: Horrible
reviews.positives: No use of an infrastructure if you can’t service your guests
reviews.negatives: We had to wait 3 hours as room was not ready even though booking was made earlier. Callous attitude of staff. In spite of repeated requests to arrange for buggy pick up for luggage, no response.

reviews.title: Good and Bad
reviews.text:
We recently stayed at this hotel with our small child, and overall it was a good experience for families. The facilities are well suited for children, with activities like kayaking, marshmallow baking, and easy access to the beach. The proximity of two nice restaurants (Not within hotel restaurants) within walking distance from the hotel beach was a pleasant surprise, adding convenience to our stay.

However, a minor inconvenience is that you need to take a cab to get around, but the location is ideal for travelers needing to catch an early morning flight as it’s only 10 minutes from the airport. The breakfast was decent, offering a wide variety of options, some kid friendly choices.

Unfortunately, the service didn't meet our expectations compared to other 5-star hotels we’ve stayed at in Thailand, including Koh Samui and Bangkok. There was no welcome drink offered upon our arrival, although my husband who checked in later was provided one. Additionally, a birthday cake was left in our room without informing us, and it just sat there looking sad.

One disappointing aspect was that I experienced several insect bites, which resembled tick bites. While I understand this can happen in many places, it did leave us feeling a bit let down.

But overall my family enjoyed the stay at Mariotto Nai Yang Beach.

reviews.title: Just another Marriott that looks just the same as anywhere else in the world
reviews.text: It's just a Marriott, not great, not bad, I think that says it all.

reviews.title: Bad Location, with average service!
reviews.text:
Pros
Good staff at kids club and Breakfast restaurant

Cons
Secluded location, poor service, dirty beach, money hungry staff (except for kids club, room cleaners and breakfast restaurant), inconveniences to get from room to lobby, (need pickup service) , expensive prices for low quality food, dirty water in shower, smelly pillows, too much to list. 

Would NOT recommend, and will never return. Worse 5 star experience ever.

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text: First this place is just like in the photos, what the photos do not tell you is that this hotel is isolated, it is not near anything, no shops, no restaurants. There is nothing to do nearby for the family, the only option is to take a hotel provided taxi to the attractions, not a cheap option each time out cost us  at least 2000 bhat. For meals etc the only option are the onsite restaurants which are not cheap. If you are a couple and are happy to stay on site for a romantic weekend away this hotel would be great, if you want a family holiday this is not a good choice, if you want access to all the activities and sights of Phukek, again this is not a good choice.  Overall we were disappointed as this hotel for a base for a family holiday.

reviews.title: I won't come back
reviews.text: It looks great from pictures, but it's not in real. The Andaman kitchen sofas have a lot stains and the food is awful. There are not many facilities to explore and the beach is a bit weird where most of the time the sea is quite far away. The sand is soft though and the water is clear. Staffs are friendly and helpful but sorry I'm not coming back.

reviews.title: Disappointing Stay for the Price - Not Suitable for Long Stays
reviews.text:
My family of four stayed at this property for six nights in a two-room suite, which was essentially a suite connected to a double room. Despite the high room rate, we were surprised to find that it was not a premium property.

We were placed in the older, run-down part of the hotel, which was in dire need of renovation. The furniture was damaged, and there were signs of water damage on the ceiling. The entire room felt dated, resembling accommodations from the early 2000s. Given the substantial amount we paid for the two-room suite, we expected to be accommodated in the newer wing.

The resort also appeared to be severely understaffed. There were always long waits when ordering and getting served at the pool area, and there was no active service on the beach. Despite our extended stay, no member of the management approached us to inquire about our experience. The few staff members present worked long hours, and management was nowhere to be seen.

On a positive note, the hotel's proximity to the airport is convenient for those with early flights. However, the hotel seems more suitable for short stays, catering to passengers in transit. The dated facilities and lack of staff and management resemble a Marriott property typically found near airports.

It's worth noting that the older wings are three stories high (G+2) and do not have elevators. Our suite was on the second floor, and accessing it was a challenging task, which was not ideal for a relaxing holiday.

The beach itself was beautiful and secluded, which we enjoyed. However, most attractions worth visiting were at least 40 minutes away from the property.

In conclusion, this hotel could be a decent option for those booking a lower room category at a much lower rate, particularly for short stays when arriving or departing Phuket. However, we would not recommend it for extended stays or as a long-stay resort.
reviews.room_type: 2 Bedroom Suite, Bedroom 1: 1 King, Bedroom 2: 2 Double, Pool view

reviews.title: I don't recommend to stay at this hotel it's really far from the city there's more other good hotels to stay
reviews.positives: The restaurant big fish is good
reviews.negatives:
I was staying at the 2 bedrooms villa #16
What I didn't like:
- I found rice in the kettle 
- There is no beach it's really far
- Our AC was really hot for two days
- Our toilet wasn't working
- When we call for a gulf car they take so long to arrive 
- Spa wasn't that good 5/110

reviews.title: Robin
reviews.text:
Nice hotel and friendly, efficient staff.
Location and facilities were a bit dissapointing. (Kayaks available but limited useage.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Was only there as was attending a wedding...not for solo travellers but more for couples and families
reviews.response:
Dear Values Guest,

On behalf of the entire hotel team, we want to thank you for sharing your most memorable experiences with us during your recent stay at the Phuket Marriott Resort and Spa, Nai Yang Beach.

It is always encouraging to hear your positive feedback, particularly when it comes from those who matter the most you! By taking pride in putting people first, we are no only executing the expectations of our values guests.

Please noted your feedback has been shared with the hotel team as critical way of understanding how we can continue to deliver great experiences. Once again, we appreciate you taking the time to share your feedback. We also recognize these are unusual times and we thank you for choosing stay with us.

Sincerely,
Pharichut Chaisoong
Front Desk Manager

reviews.title: Secluded and far from any action!
reviews.text: If you don’t mind at minimum a 30 minute Bolt, Grab or Taxi ride to go and do anything off site then you’ve found the perfect spot. The pool is ok for cooling off with a nice view. The beach is drastically affected by the tide so they only let you sign out SUP’s and Kayaks when it’s high tide. Which makes sense because you will have to carry the equipment for 1/4 mile before you can float. The breakfast buffet (opens 7am) is not bad and buying the breakfast package is pretty much a must for the days you know that you’re on site until 7:30. You can grab a quick bite then catch your ride to your destination for the day. If you like to stream your TV shows and movies come prepared with a VPN on your device so that you don’t get kicked out of your mom’s YouTube account. TV channels are limited and I’ve seen better options at a motel 6 in the Wyoming oil field. How can they not offer streaming options like on an airplane. We visited during monsoon season and it was quite and boring. The vibe is likely better when there are more people but that has its cons as well.
reviews.room_type: Family Room, Bedroom 1: 1 King, Bedroom 2: 2 Double

reviews.title: Trick consumers
reviews.text:
I booked a room for 4 guests.
But i had to pay for 2 more people at the hotel. The hotel told us that extra person wasn't  included in the price we paid through Agoda and it was written in the receipt. Yes, it was but in a very small size and it was written as "extra person pay at the hotel". There was no room capacity or extra from how many people to clarify this trick statement at all!!

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Pric

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: This hotel is near the airport. U can see airplanes from the property. On the left of the property there are still construction of new homes,- will take a long time. The beach is not very nice, in low tide, the waters are receded very far away from the property.  on the brightside, during low tide u can walk to Nai Yang beach in about 10 mins, which has better beach side for the kids. Otherwise, the hotel is clean and well maintained.

reviews.title: Only if you need to stay near the airport
reviews.text: Spent 4 nights at the hotel. The price is reasonable under the Marriott brand and the consequence is that you will find the breakfast venue very packed. The staff is very helpful and the facilities are sufficient.  However, the nearby restaurants or shops are beyond walking distance.

It appears to be a brand new hotel but the location is a bit far from everything else in Phuket though it is close to the airport.

housekeeping was very nice
the pool is nice and clean
breakfast was my favourite part although I would’ve liked more cheese types but otherwise I loved the pancakes a lot!

reviews.title: Great short stay
reviews.text: My stay was only for two nights, so this place was great.  However, if you want night life and activities away from the hotel, I recommend you keep searching.  This is a great place for couples and families. But as a solo travelers, I was not impressed.

reviews.title: Nice but not for us
reviews.text: This hotel is situated away from everything so you only can get somewhere with taxis. Also travelling with small children it was impossible to get around the hotel with baby stroller because of so many stairs everywhere and only one elevator between the lobby. Verry annoying. Expensive and for us not worth the price.

reviews.title: Disappointed. Did not live up to Marriott's reputation!
reviews.text:
My family and I reached at 3pm, tried to check-in to our 2 rooms but was told one of our rooms wasn't ready. This isn't acceptable since we delibrately took a later flight in so that we can check-in at 3pm as stated in our bookings and hotel website. 

We argued about this for a bit before they upgraded our room. However, their version of upgrade was to put us in the old wing with creepy wood decor, something we delibrately avoided by selecting the room with marble decor during booking. We then requested to back to new wing. 

Afterwhich, we went to the reception to enquire about car rental. We were told that we coud get the hotel to make the necessary arrangements. However, when we went back in the evening to request for car rental, we were told to head to the airport to rent. The concierge refused to assist us with our request and we had to pay additional taxi fare to get back to the airport in order to rent a car. UTTERLY DISAPPOINTING. We had booked with Marriott because we believed had believed in the brand but not anymore!

reviews.title: A wonderful stay!
reviews.text: Highly recommend booking a villa if you are traveling with several people. Private pool is great. Regular pool access rooms are also nice and clean. Each morning we would walk straight out to the pool and swim out to the main pool. Great and friendly staff!
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 2 Double, Pool view, Pool access

reviews.title: View from the lobby is breathtaking but beware the sandflies on the beach
reviews.text:
Pros:
1) Food is great
2) amazing view from lobby & main pool areas
3) kids club was great & kids enjoyed themselves there

Cons:
1) The sandflies on the beach! We couldn’t play there
2) the shallowest pool was 0.8m deep & the access was via a stepping stone. It’s ok for older kids (4+ and above) but it was too deep for my toddler to stand in to play. 
3) room ID needs updating

reviews.title: Good​ service &​ Nice​ food
reviews.text: I​ will​ say​ that​ everything​ and​ some​ service​ staff​ so​ nice​ K.​Racheal &​K.Rinny (FB)​

reviews.title: Nice for a brief layover, but not a main-stay
reviews.text:
My wife and I stayed here for one night during a layover, but it was clear we wouldn't choose Marriott going forward for primary accomodations.  The property was pretty disappointing, and if no matter were you are it's a literal hike back to the lobby.  I experienced this late one night when our key card decided to stop working.  An emergency telephone system should really be installed.  What if someone was in medical/mortal danger? 

Outside out of that, the room was nice, nothing special.  The style and decor were clearly chosen by a corporate board.  The pool looked okay, lot's of kids running around.

The staff was very friendly, and check-in, although drawn out, was met with a welcome drink and fresh towel.  They also helped us book a transport into town for dinner and back to the airport.

reviews.title: Great place to stay to relax
reviews.text: Hotel breakfast and the Thai Restaurant is good and value for money.  We got not much to do just outside the hotel.  The private beach is beautiful but the staff there is not polite.. any activities at that bench depend on the tide.  We drove to the nearest bench  Nai Yang beach to have some lunch  and whole family down with food poisoning.  Location is far from anywhere accept the airport.

reviews.title: Nice hotel and beach, but be wary of small flies
reviews.text:
We stayed here for 9 nights at the Pool Access Room. The hotel itself was very nice with a good pool, clean beach and some good food; staff were very friendly and pleasant .  The room too was great and spacious enough. 

However, we had to deal with a dozen flies on a nightly basis. Though the hotel's location means that bugs are unavoidable, the sheer number of small flies (killing 10 a night was standard) made some evenings really uncomfortable. One night, a fly even flew into my mouth!

If you do not mind potentially dealing with this annoyance, then this hotel is a great choice for a good, relaxing holiday.

reviews.title: Quiet and serene
reviews.text: Worth stating here if you treasure a relaxing break that’s not hectic

reviews.title: Emergency overnight stay
reviews.text: We stayed at the Marriott Nai Yang as a last minute emergency as our flight home had been cancelled. The hotel is only a short ride to the airport yet that doesn’t impact the sense of resort feel, and tranquility you get at the Marriott. The only critique I had is that there is not much shade at the pool.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: We book a garden view room and request for easy access as we travel with a 1 year old. The staff was so kind they upgrade our room to pool access. Overall our stay was pleasant. One thing to complain is the kid’s club is really small and toys and books are old. Very old that they look like they will be easily tear n toys don’t look very clean.

reviews.title: Nice hotel not more
reviews.positives:
Looks good , we’ll maintain, comfortable bad 
And The pool very lovely
reviews.negatives:
The front desk stuff is not friendly as I used from marriot (moved to there from 4 points Phuket that was perfect !! ) 
Seems that they doing the minimum and not care about you . 
Non elevator et all . And lots of walking on hard ways , not for old people and children. We stayed in 3 floor and it was awful . 
The hotel very far from everything and yet they have only 2 times a day shuttle service . 
Don’t clean out room for 3 days until we asked 
And all this little thing that you don’t expect from 5 stars hostel , nevertheless from Marriot .

reviews.title: The sandy beach and the pool are both great.
reviews.text: It was a very satisfying stay with a beautiful beach almost devoid of people, a pool that you can enter directly from the room, and friendly staff. My wife was thrilled with the surprise birthday cake! However, it was a downside that despite arriving at the check-in time of 3 PM, the room was not ready, and we had to wait for an hour.
reviews.room_type: Guest Room, 2 Double, Garden View, Pool Cabana

reviews.title: There was no sea
reviews.text: Everything in the hotel was of a high standard, but if you want to swim in the sea, this is the worst choice, because there is no sea there, the water is quite far.

reviews.title: Nice hotel

The breakfast is brilliant.

reviews.title: Pros and Cons (From a 10 time stayer in this part of the island)
reviews.text:
Pros: Lovely quiet location, away from everything. Big pool, some rooms with pool access. Wine selection was decent, though pricey (to be expected). Nice staff.

Cons: The food should be better. From being given cold sticky toffee pudding (and having to explain that it should be hot, 3 times...), having Pavlova with the taste of garlic (cross-contamination) and all round mediocre mains.

Room upgrade was disappointing, and later, felt like it might be a strategy for filling their older crappier (though larger and with pool view) rooms. If you book a deluxe garden room because of its modern interior, don't accept an upgrade to a premier room with pool view (old interior). 

Conclusion: Stay at the Pullman Naithon (a few km away and part of the same footprint taken up by the national park). The rooms are better, food is better, the views are better, the beach is better - Marriot is in a bay with very low tide and no waves.  Pullman is on a cliff and facing west so the waves are great.

reviews.text:
The breakfast is good  and staffs were friendly. 
One thing that I didn't like was I got the room on third floor, it was very tiring walking up and down when you forgot something. The staff at the check in didn't tell me that the room is on the third floor.

Other than that everything is good I'm very happy staying here.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
This resort was an excellent choice for my family as we wanted our trip to be a quiet and peaceful. 
We stayed the room number starting 5***. It is conveniently located to get to the hotel restaurants. And staff are extremely kind and helpful. It shined up my days every time to run into them.  And also I’d rate their food as almost 10/10. We loved their food.
My only issue was the swimming pool at my roomside, wasn’t so clean. My son kept complaining the pool was sandy and dusty. and the pool floor got stains.. almost wanted to ask to change the room but didn’t bother it too much. Another thing was, my room shower head water spreaded sideway due to the loose part. 
Nevertheless, I would go back to this hotel and will def ask for the room with cleaner swimming pool.
reviews.response:
Dear GyongMi, 

Warm greetings from Phuket Marriott Resort and Spa, Nai Yang Beach and many thanks for the feedback.
 
We are very happy to know you are very enjoyed during stayed with us. We hope to have a chance welcome you back again soon. 

If any further you may have , please feel free to contact me. 

Best regards, 
Lucy
Front Desk Manager

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
New hotel. Great staff. Always responding to our requests.
Breakfast restaurant space and number of tables unfortunately not adequate. You have to wait but not too long, still you can see that they did not evaluate the number of chairs and tables that they would need during peak hours.
Same for the long chairs around the pool.
We had a good stay and our kids liked it. Recommend to rent a car.
Nai Thon beach is just around the corner and is clean and not overcrowded.s

Warm greetings from Phuket Marriott Resort and Spa, Nai Yang Beach and many thanks for the feedback.
 
We are very happy to know you are very enjoyed during stayed with us. We hope to have a chance welcome you back again soon. 

If any further you may have , please feel free to contact me. 

Best regards, 
Lucy
Front Desk Manager

reviews.title: Nice Resort Hotel
reviews.text:
Not near the hustle and bustle of Phuket, but if you are looking to relax in a resort hotel, with friendly staff, nice pool, beach in walking distance, this place is very nice.

There's a couple of restaurants where the food is good. There is a near by village where you can walk / shuttle bus for a bit of variety. 

There is a few things to do at the resort. Mainly relax by the pool or beach and eat :-)

Most of all, the staff go out of their way to make sure you are enjoying your stay.
reviews.response:

Lucy
Front Desk Manager

reviews.title: Weekend Stay
reviews.text: We arrived earlier than check in timing, and was offered the option of upgrade with additional cost. Took that up since we want to check in early. Paid to be upgraded to a villa, in which space was awesome. Villa was clean too, equipped with a small private pool and lawn area. Buggy services to and fro the villa was an option. Staffs were friendly and helpful. Downside was the venue was too far away from the city centre, 45 mins ride if you are looking to go to the city centre. There was nothing much around to eat except for Nai yang village, which was a 20 mins walk away. Pool was great, unfortunately, too many children during the weekend stay.

reviews.title: Overall, it is considered good, but I think it can be better than this!
reviews.text:
The service staff were very good, I liked it a lot. Even the buggy driver provided great service and was very polite. However, on the day I went, the air conditioning in the small bedroom broke down, so I had to sleep in a regular bedroom.

The breakfast was not very varied, but it was tasty.

Overall, it was good, but for the price paid, I expected a bit more. As for the service, all the staff were lovely, including the buggy driver, who was polite.
reviews.room_type: 2 Bedroom Larger Villa, Bedroom 1: 1 King, Bedroom 2: 2 Double, Oceanfront, Private Pool

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Breakfast was incredible, so many yummy choices. Staff was so friendly and spoke English beautifully. Pool was clean and not over crowded. Our kids enjoyed adventuring through these narrow pool pathways for a fun adventure. Beach had low tide, so we could walk and explore and swim in shallow water. So many fun activities on the resort, we enjoyed movie night. Restaurants on site were delicious and had beautiful views on the beach. Our room was lovely, clean and spacious. Our family enjoyed playing card games on the balcony overlooking the pool. We absolutely would go back and stay again.

reviews.title: Clean and comfortable
reviews.text: The hotel is beautiful, clean and comfortable. The staffs are very nice.

reviews.title: First accessible accommodation
reviews.text:
A wonderful pool and beautiful sea, along with tranquility, make it a perfect place to stay quietly with family and kids. The view of seeing planes from nearby while swimming was top-notch. If there is a need to move accommodations, the second or first place would be just as good. 

I enjoyed relaxing without moving here, but if one were to stay only in this place, it might be inconvenient when traveling around Phuket.

reviews.title: It was an amazing short stay!
reviews.text:
It was our final day and night in Phuket, and we decided to stay at the hotel closer to the airport. The staff and facilities were superb! The stuff for recreational activities name Muniz and the other one were so attentive. We attended the animal folding towel activities while waiting for our check in. Our kids had an amazing experience. They learn the folding techniques and a few Thai Words like Chang  and Hong. The pool was massive but if the hotel would lite up around the pool would be nice as it gets dark around 6.30pm since the pool open until 7pm. 
The breakfast has lots of choices to choose from. And we can eat with confident since the chef told us its all halal ingredients served and used.
Thank you Marriot Nai Yang, for a short but meaningful stay we had!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: very nice 👍🏻

reviews.title: Recommended accommodations near the airport.
reviews.text: It is very, very close to the airport. I chose it because I arrived on a night flight and didn't want to go far, and since it's far from the busy area, I had given up on things like night markets and massages. However, I was very impressed when I went to Nai Yang Town, which can be accessed by hotel shuttle. You can dine while enjoying an incredible sunset due to the local massage shops and tables set up by the beach. Nai Yang Beach is also very beautiful, and you can enjoy the sea much more peacefully than in Patong or Old Town. The water pressure is the best... the filter wasn't dirty... I won't forget the lobster and tiger shrimp I had while watching the sunset at Nai Yang Beach, and I definitely want to go back...

reviews.title: Perfect!
reviews.positives: Food was great! Pool was amazing and the beach absolutely beautiful.

reviews.title: Short and Pleasant Stay
reviews.text: I recently stayed at the Phuket Marriott and Spa in Nai Yang Beach for just one night. The rooms are huge and my room overlooked the massive pool and beach. I did not get to use the facilities but the pool looked very nice. Staff are very friendly and accommodated all my requests. I had dinner with some guests at the seafood restuarnat and the food was very fresh and tasty. This hotel is perfect for couples or families that just want to relax and spend time using the hotel facilities. The hotel is far from any of the popular tourist areas.

reviews.title: Incredible we will be back.
reviews.positives:
The property is amazing so beautiful everything about to location/design/facilities. 
The pool is incredible.
The beach is a lot more private than most hotel beaches in phuket. The location is super close tot he airport but felt remote. The food was fantastic!
reviews.negatives: The rooms and bathroom are full with mosquitos and every time it gets cleaned they are back again because the door is left open to clean. I think the design of the bathrooms is very dark and layout/damp environment means that mosquitos are attracted there is a lot of damp from the shower and bath being open to each other I think they need to be separated by a glass. Mosquito lamps should be provided as a solution.

reviews.title: Beautiful place, very clean hotel
reviews.text:
The hotel is in a very nice place, beach front and a shuttle to the villa nearby. The accommodation  is great, we received an upgrade to a direct pool apartment.
The beach is a bit dirty with plastic and broken glass, but in front of the hotel it is cleaned. There no activities happening at the hotel despite a beach party one day. Nothing really attracted the kids, the beach volleyball was empty, no one in the beach soccer area. Some resorts are more proactive in this matter and we felt that this is more focused on adults.

reviews.title: Lovely stay near
reviews.positives: beds were comfortable , the swimming pool and the breakfast were amazing.
reviews.negatives: the fact that you need to climb stairs to reach to your room. the rate is too expansive keeping in mind that you can not use the beach of the hotel due to the Tide. and there is no Gard  or sign to warn you to walk to reach the water which far far far away from the Hotel which I found unsafe for the guest

reviews.title: 2-night healing at Marriott Resort
reviews.text: It's the perfect place to truly enjoy a hotel staycation. It's close to the airport, but it's a 30-minute distance from the busy areas like Jung-gu, so the location is a bit disappointing, but the resort itself was really great. The pool is truly perfect. I think it would be comfortable to just think of it as a place where you can take care of everything within the resort and have fun. I recommend it if you want a relaxing vacation with kids too.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 2 Double, Pool view, Pool access

reviews.title: The beach was disappointing.
reviews.text:
The facility is very clean and gives the impression that cleaning is thorough. The staff are all very friendly. However, the beach was somewhat disappointing. 
- The beach is quite shallow; at low tide, it almost becomes a mudflat, so the waves are quite far away. 
- There is no large trash on the beach, but there is a lot of small litter. The beach I visited a little while ago in Langkawi had almost no trash and was clean, which made this beach stand out more. 
- A dog that seems to belong to the restaurant (not directly managed by the hotel) on the beach in front of the hotel barked at tourists walking by in the early morning (around 7:30) and chased them around.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 2 Double, Pool view, Pool access

reviews.positives: Spacious room and balcony. Wide variety of breakfast and restaurant menu.
reviews.negatives: Beach water.

reviews.title: A hotel where you can enjoy a laid-back resort experience.
reviews.text: A resort hotel located in a peaceful area about 15 minutes from the airport. It's right in front of the sea, but the hotel's beach is always low tide, making it impossible to swim. However, by taking the hotel shuttle bus to Nyan Beach, there is a beach with high waves where you can swim. Nyan Beach is a small town, but it has massages and cafes, so during the mornings of my stay, I enjoyed massages at Nyan Beach and relaxed in the hotel room or by the pool in the afternoons. For dinner, I recommend a chic local restaurant right next door that you can walk to from the hotel beach. I could enjoy delicious Thai food at a quarter of the price of the hotel's restaurant.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We appreciated the kindness and helpfulness of Sai.  She was so cute at the continental breakfast and my handicapped son feel so welcomed.  The grounds were beautiful.  The cleaning lady did such a great job cleaning the rooms and was such a kind and gentle person. The security nen at the beach were very helpful to me as I dragged my sons wheel chair back onto beach property
reviews.negatives: I wish there was handicapped accessible ways to get into the pool, Like a ramp. I got my son out by making him face the pool wall, then grab his legs and swing them out, as he lands on a towel I placed on pool edge.  Also wheel chair signs for how to get to road that goes around the pool area. I walked him  and wheel chair up and down stairs until someone told me about the road.

reviews.title: Very nice property

reviews.negatives: This is not staff related but mosquitos was a big problem for me

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Wonderful atmosphere

reviews.title: Best hotel ever
reviews.positives: Everything. The breakfast is amazing. The staff is nice, friendly and they are always ready to help you. A lot of facilities to enjoy like spa, beach, pool, bars and restaurants. The massage worth every penny. From time to time they serve you fresh fruits on the beach, they have cocktail happy hours every afternoon and themed dinner nights at the main restaurant. Spacious room, bathroom with bathtub.

reviews.title: Leisure vacation experience
reviews.text: The hotel is very close to the airport, about a 10-15 minute drive, so it’s worth considering staying there for the last couple of days of your trip. The entire resort has a high sense of relaxation, the staff service is excellent, and the spa is worth a try. Although it is relatively remote (you need to take a taxi in and out), there aren't too many shops and restaurants nearby, but the quality of the hotel’s several restaurants is also very good, and the buffet breakfast is very abundant. The rooms are beautiful and the hotel has direct access to the beach. The hotel pool is large and lovely, but there are no lifeguards, and the steps are relatively sharp, so you should be careful when using them.

reviews.title: it is the our second time and it was great on both

reviews.title: Reasons to visit Marriott Naiyang during your trip to Phuket.
reviews.text: First of all, it's very convenient to visit the resort after arriving at night since it's so close to the airport. Nai Yang Beach is still a quiet area, so you can truly enjoy the concept of relaxation. The perfect swimming pool right in front of Nai Yang Beach was a place where the whole family could have a wonderful time.

reviews.title: Beautiful environment and a good location.
reviews.text: The famous Marriott hotel has a shuttle bus to Nai Yang beach, where there are many restaurants and massage shops, as well as stables available for booking horseback rides along the beach. Next to the hotel's Mama's Kitchen, there is a restaurant that is affordable and good value, highly recommended! This time, I stayed in a pool access room, which is very convenient as you can open the door and reach the pool directly. From the pool, you can access the public pool, which is quite lively and faces the beautiful beach environment! The breakfast selection is abundant and tasty, highly recommended! There are no large shopping malls near the hotel, and there isn't much to do at night.

reviews.title: Best hotel experience ever
reviews.text: Definitely a 5 star hotel unlike some other 5 star places we’ve stayed at. It’s not too close to many things so I recommend staying closer to the Phuket town/Karon area and ending it at the Marriott Resort and Spa in Nai Yang beach. Just beautiful and quiet. Breakfast buffet is so good too!!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: the pool surrounding the hotel making it cozy and easy to access the main pool
reviews.negatives: the food. and the breakfast was below average.

reviews.title: Honest honest review
reviews.text:
This hotel is stunning, it's absolutely beautiful and the attention to detail in how the hotel looks is second to none. But I believe that's what you pay for. We stayed here on the second half of our honeymoon for 5 nights after coming from another 5* hotel on an island. In comparing the two, the Marriott was extremely expensive for nothing more than the other. The food is "ok" but extortionately priced compared to other places in Thailand for equal quality food. We ate in every restaurant at the hotel through the week and honestly the lounge was by far the nicest food. A lot of my review will be based on the price of things because this was the biggest shock to me, for Thailand prices, it is far more than anywhere else I've stayed on any of my trips to Thailand with nothing additional to make it worth the price. 

However, IF you are a family with children and want to go to a resort where you have activities for the kids, options of where to eat, a beautiful sized pool and huge bedrooms then I absolutely 100% recommend this for the price of it. 

If you are a couple who want to go somewhere beautiful and relaxing with good food and access to a spa for massages and have private access to a pool, this is good. But there are far better for far less. This is the only hotel I have stayed in in Thailand (4 others, all 5*) where there isnt more than water complimentary in the room. There is however a little shop in the hotel where everything (bar alcohol) in the mini bar is sold for much less than the mini bar prices, so go there for snacks and cold drinks rather than the mini bar.

The staff are absolutely incredible here, I can't fault them at all. They remembered our room number at breakfast every morning despite having hundreds of guests stay. Every staff member who we met recognised us and came to chat and were so so friendly. There is a wonderful initiative on hot days that we affectionately called "ice cream Santa" where two young guys on a canoe come with a bell and an ice cream cooler and hand out free ice creams. They were so friendly and funny and they stopped to chat with us every day when we were laid on the balcony. The quality of the cars for the transfers to and from excursions or the airport are very very high and the drivers again were all very lovely. 

All in all, a wonderful stay which we really enjoyed, however, for 5 nights we paid £1511 including food and beverage credit and a spa massage. comparitavely, an equally beautiful hotel with an entirely private pool rather than private access and an in room massage and an entirely complimentary mini bar was £800 including all food for the 5 nights before. So, it's an expensive hotel which doesn't entirely feel worth it if you are a couple wanting a peaceful getaway, however, if you are a family and want something with lots of options for kids- go for it.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Pool view, Pool access

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Breakfast at The Andaman's restaurant was excellent. The beach wasn't something spectacular. The food at Big Fish and at Mama's kitchen was excellent.

reviews.text: This hotel was awesome! Please ask for Beer at check in. He’s the nicest person. The  room pools connecting to main pool blew my kids minds. The view from the pool is jaw dropping. The beach is beautiful. The location is a little out of the way but nice to be away from all the hustle and bustle. We will definitely stay here again next time.

I will stay again when I back to Phuket

reviews.title: Overall our stay is very good and it should be excellent for the price we paid for the room
reviews.positives: Wonderful,extremely Nice reception staff specially the gentleman named JJ he is willing to solve every little request on friendly manner.our stay are comfortable
reviews.negatives:
Bit isolated and long drive to downtown .
Room prices are high .
Wellness treatment are quite expensive compared to other similar hotels and local spas,even more upscale ones.

reviews.title: Service sets them apart!
reviews.text: Had a really enjoyable time here for 4d3n. Attentive service and we were able to buggy around the resort with my dad (who needs some help walking) and a small child, alongside 2 more family members. Every staff was friendly and genuine in their service. Pool access rooms made it a breeze to enjoy the pool everyday as it connected us directly to the main pool. Some surprises in the form of little treats for guests in the hotel.. more shld be added to enhance the experience in this hotel, given it is not within walking distance to external restaurants. Some construction going on at one side of the hotel but noise was not particularly jarring. Already a great serene getaway.. but made special with exceptional service from staff.. thank you Mariott!
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Pool view, Pool access

reviews.title: Superb location just 10mins from Phuket international airport and private beach!
reviews.positives: superb location just 10 mns drive from Phuket international airport, the property has a private beach and necessary amenities to support both work and pleasure stay. Room condition is spacious for 2 people with short walking access to large swimming pools. We did enjoy morning run outside the hotel (total distance from the hotel to main road is approx 3.5km)
reviews.negatives: Breakfast is abit plain and unexciting, walking to the room during raining season could be somewhat unplesant.

reviews.title: Family trip
reviews.text: It was best for the family. All the staff were kind and made us comfortable. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: very comfortable, very kind staff. they let us stay until our late flight and even gave us an extra room (at no charge) to shower and rest in before the flight.
reviews.negatives: It’s VERY far removed so expect high cab rates & expensive prices at the hotel for food if you decide to stay on the property.

clean 
near air port 10 mins

reviews.title: Perfect for short getaway
reviews.text:
It was a short 10-minute drive from the airport, with great service and high level of cleanliness. Staff also speak good english so checking in and out were a breeze! 

We were also given a free room upgrade as we were on our honeymoon!

reviews.title: great views of the beach made it worth it
reviews.positives: the rooms were amazing and the staff was wonderful and more than helpful.
reviews.negatives: during our first days at the hotel the staff was amazing, but on our last morning there were new staff who were attentive to cleaning breakfast tables and the food seemed to have been served half fast.

reviews.title: Relaxing time
reviews.text: Short distance from the airport and a very clean and cozy place to be. The level of staff is very high. They are all attentive and polite, including the staff managing the gardens, pool, etc. The English language proficiency is also very high.

reviews.title: Lovely quiet hotel
reviews.text: Only stayed one night at the end of our trip as its near the airport. We spent a nice day lounging around the pool and some nice local/authentic restaurants nearby on the beach.

reviews.title: Peaceful and Serene
reviews.text: The resort is very peaceful and serene. Excellent beachfront location coupled with exceedingly warm Marriott hospitality make it worthwhile to stay. Breakfast spread is one of the best in Phuket. Kudos to the team !! 5 Stars all the way.

reviews.title: Breakfast
reviews.text: The best breakfast buffet of any hotel   we've stayed at.

reviews.title: 100% will return here!
reviews.text: I could not be happier with my experience at this hotel. Room designs were unique and facilities well maintained. All staff were well trained, professional and friendly. I’d like to give special credit to Billy who worked at the Lounge, who went the extra mile to keep me comfortable while waiting for my hotel transfer after check out. Thank you Billy!

reviews.title: โรงแรมดี สวย อาหารอร่อย มื้อเช้าดีมาก
reviews.text:
ประทับใจมากค่ะ โรงแรมดี สตาฟดีมาก facility ดีมาก breakfast ดีมากๆ ทุกอย่างใช้ของดี แม้กระทั่งผลไม้ 

ข้อเสียที่เจอคือ อยุ่ค่อนข้างลึก ต้องขับรถเท่านั้น และหาดไม่ค่อยสวย สำหรับคนชอบเล่นน้ำทะเลอาจจะไม่ฟินเท่าไหร่ แต่บรรยากาศโดยรวมดีมากๆค่ะ
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 2 Double, Pool view, Pool access

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel but slow service
reviews.text:
Positives
1) the rooms and facilities are amazing

2) very good breakfast buffet 

Negatives:
Short on staff around pool /restaurants area. 

The beach is nice but water a bit far for most of the day (low tides)
reviews.room_type: Guest Room, 2 Double, Garden View, Pool Cabana

reviews.title: Great option near the airport
reviews.text: The hotel was great. The kids room is great. Everyday, once a day, there was a boat that gives out free ice cream for all the guests and every evening gave out free smores at the beach. Sometimes there’s a live band performing. The little touches of service here and there was really great. The hotel breakfast was really good too. Would definitely recommend. However the beach isn’t exactly the best

reviews.title: Most of the staff are nice
reviews.text: Most of the staff are nice, some exceptional friendly, went out of their way to help us. But there is 1 lady in the main kitchen has a stern face to us when we talked to her and I turned around and saw her happily greeting cassations. I hope I was wrong but it made me a bit uncomfortable and tried to avoid her for the rest of the days we went to the kitchen. Everything beside her is a 5-star experience.
reviews.room_type: 2 Bedroom Suite, Bedroom 1: 1 King, Bedroom 2: 2 Double, Pool view

reviews.title: A quiet spot to enjoy the days
reviews.text: I can’t really sum it up very easily but the Marriott really exceeded all of our expectations.  It is a beautiful property , well maintained and with a lovely pool and beach as a sort of centre piece.   I worried it wouldn’t be that suitable for young children, but it was quite the opposite.  There were many great activities on offer and the kids centre , while smaller than others I’ve seen , was well run and had lots to offer my 1.5 and 8 year olds !   I would easily go back and plan to soon !

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: If you want somewhere quiet and to stay in one place, this hotel is perfect.  The resort is far from the busy areas of Phuket. When we were there, it was low tide most of the time on the beach and the water wasn't clean. We  mostly used the pool, which is huge and very clean. The resort itself has restaurants with good food, the breakfast bar was huge with lots of delicious options. Very clean hotel, staff very friendly.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Garden view, Pool cabana

reviews.title: Phuket family trip
reviews.text: This is a great hotel with good facilities, nice staffs and good restaurants.  We spend majority of our time in the hotel during our trip in Phuket.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 2 Double, Pool view, Pool access

reviews.title: A place to stay in the grass and sea.
reviews.text: A remote location, which can be both an advantage and a disadvantage, is a place where the quietness is far from the bustling commercial area, but it also has the inconvenient aspect of lacking small attractions. There are three restaurants within the resort where meals are available, albeit at a high price, so you won't go hungry. It is true that the airport is nearby, and there is more frequent noise from departing planes on weekends, but personally, I don't mind the aircraft noise much, and there was also the fun of watching planes fly by. Since there aren't many people, you can enjoy the pool and ocean activities in a very peaceful manner. The sea is typically shallow and calm, even if you walk out for a while during high tide. There aren't many marine creatures to observe; it's just playing in the sea water. The waves are too mild for surfing games. Overall, the staff was friendly, and the resort had a clean and neat atmosphere.

reviews.title: amazing!!
reviews.text: away from crowd , great for family with little kids,, beach is nice and clean. i will visit again!!

reviews.title: Fantastic Hotel
reviews.text: I have stayed at a lot of hotels around Phuket- and the service, location and private beach are amazing here. We'll only stay at this hotel from now on whenever we visit Phuket.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Pool view, Pool access

reviews.title: relax and peaceful trip
reviews.text:
Nice staff and helpful. 
Nice , quiet and beautiful place.
The pool and room is clean. 
Definitely come back next time.
So much good

reviews.title: Exceptional and relaxing stay
reviews.text:
We had a very comfortable and relaxing stay at the hotel.

The pools, breakfast, staff and cleanliness were all exceptional. Would highly recommend for a quality family stay.

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: Great hotel, great staff. Breakfast was super amazing.

reviews.title: Convenient location and attentive staff
reviews.text:
We enjoyed our four day long stay with the hotel.  We were assigned room 7210 which was located  at the top of the property and involved quite a bit of staircase climbing from the beach. Room was large and with the balcony with the partial view of the sea. 
Food was mix and match, excellent breakfast but our launch/dinner experiences wasn’t that tasty. A simple fried seafood rice we order at the big fish restaurant was  bland and tasteless. 
Staff was always attentive and welcoming. 
On the day of our departure, tide brought in a lot of oil clogs and most of the people on the beach got dirty and stained. One more thing that really (has nothing to do with the hotel I guess) annoyed us, were some kind of tiny mosquitos who bit us really badly while lounging on the beach. 
Overall I would recommend the hotel for a relaxing and calm stay in Phuket.

reviews.title: Great for stay with family....
reviews.text: Nai Yang Beach is not that much famous then others yet. So, can have a great time without many people on the beach. Breakfast was good enough for all family and also all people who working at the hotel was great too. Traffic to other palace by work little bit difficult with too inside location of hotel.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 2 Double, Pool view, Pool access
